Levitate 2026

Defy the Pull
November 12-13, 2026  |  AeroSpace Tech Center, Geneva, Switzerland

Join the world's leading minds in anti-gravity research, quantum levitation, and advanced propulsion systems for a groundbreaking two-day symposium. Levitate 2026 explores the bleeding edge of theoretical physics and practical engineering that will lift humanity to the stars.

Secure Your Pass
00 Days
00 Hours
00 Minutes
00 Seconds

Event Highlights

Why Attend

Join the avant-garde of physics and engineering. Network with pioneers, investors, and visionaries shaping the future of global transit and deep space exploration.

Zero-G Demos

Witness live, macroscopic demonstrations of localized gravity disruption. See theoretical physics translated into practical, hover-capable technology right before your eyes.

Key Stats

2 Days of intensive sessions.
8 Keynote Visionaries.
Over 500 Global Innovators.
1 Unified Goal: To lift humanity to the stars.
